sqlCommands.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID,PC,Flex1,PCdesc,Hierarchy,Division,Region,Location,Zone,Flex6,Flex7,Flex8,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,Flex5) (select '[batchID]',PCTR,Name,Descr,Hierarchy,Division,Region,Location,Zone,MajorClass,Product,Program,Blocked,ValidThru,UpdatedOn,UpdatedBy from PCTRS)
update TransX set TPname = p.Name from TransX t inner join TPs p on t.TP = p.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Amt4 = f2.Amt1 from TransX f1 inner join (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, CC, TP, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, Amt1, Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US') f2 on f1.KeyID = f2.KeyID and f1.Co = f2.Co and f1.GL = f2.GL and f1.PC = f2.PC and isnull(f1.CC,'') = isnull(f2.CC,'') and f1.TP = f2.TP and f1.BusCat = f2.BusCat and f1.Contract = f2.Contract and isnull(f1.UWYR,'') = isnull(f2.UWYR,'') and f1.TTY = f2.TTY and f1.Flex1 = f2.Flex1 and f1.Amt1 = f2.Amt1
update TransX set GL = substring(GL,1,3) + '9901' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 <> 'pass1' and GL like '%9900'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, CC, TP, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, Amt1, Flex1) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, '' as PC, '' as CC, '' as TP, '' as BusCat, Contract, isnull(UWYR,'') as UWYR, '' as TTY, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, 'pass4' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 <> 'pass1' and GL > '4000000' group by KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL,  Contract, isnull(UWYR,''))
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Flex1 in ('pass2','pass3') or Amt1 = 0)

update TransX set Amt2 = f2.Amt1 from TransX f1 inner join (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, CC, TP, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, Amt1, Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF') f2 on f1.KeyID = f2.KeyID and f1.Co = f2.Co and f1.GL = f2.GL and f1.PC = f2.PC and isnull(f1.CC,'') = isnull(f2.CC,'') and f1.TP = f2.TP and f1.BusCat = f2.BusCat and f1.Contract = f2.Contract and isnull(f1.UWYR,'') = isnull(f2.UWYR,'') and f1.TTY = f2.TTY and f1.Flex1 = f2.Flex1 and f1.Amt1 = f2.Amt1

update TransX set Amt3 = f2.Amt1 from TransX f1 inner join (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, CC, TP, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, Amt1, Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG') f2 on f1.KeyID = f2.KeyID and f1.Co = f2.Co and f1.GL = f2.GL and f1.PC = f2.PC and isnull(f1.CC,'') = isnull(f2.CC,'') and f1.TP = f2.TP and f1.BusCat = f2.BusCat and f1.Contract = f2.Contract and isnull(f1.UWYR,'') = isnull(f2.UWYR,'') and f1.TTY = f2.TTY and f1.Flex1 = f2.Flex1 and f1.Amt1 = f2.Amt1
update TransX set Ledger = 'Z000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF' and Amt1 = Amt3 and Amt1 = Amt4
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG' and Amt1 = Amt2 and Amt1 = Amt4
update TransX set amt1 = amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = '', Flex3 = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = Descr, TPname = Field2 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on Contract = ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'HUD_STM_Contracts' and Co <> '2008'

update TransX set Flex3 = Descr, TPname = ID from TransX inner join (select min(Descr) as Descr, min(ID) as ID, Field2 from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'HUD_STM_Contracts' group by Field2) a on Contract = Field2 where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Co = '2008'
update TransX set TPname = Contract from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Flex3 in ('d - FAC')
update TransX set Flex4 = Field2, Flex2 = Field3 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on Contract = ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'HUD_STM_Contracts' and Co in ('2300','2400','2450')
update TransX set Flex4 = Contract from TransX where Co = '2008'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, CC, TP, BusCat, Contract, UWyr,TTY,Flex1,Flex2,Flex4, Amt1) (select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, isnull(CC,''), TP, BusCat, Contract, UWyr,TTY, 'pass1', Flex2,Flex4, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, CC, TP, BusCat, Contract, UWyr,TTY,Flex1,Flex2,Flex4, Amt1) (select '[batchID]', Ledger, Co, GL, PC, isnull(CC,''), TP, BusCat, Contract, UWyr,TTY, 'pass1', Flex2,Flex4, Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = 'Hist Elim-S02' and Yr < [year])

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, CC, TP, BusCat, Contract, UWyr,TTY,Flex2,Flex4, Amt1) (select '[batchID]', Ledger, Co, GL, PC, isnull(CC,''), TP, BusCat, Contract, UWyr,TTY, Flex2,Flex4, Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = 'Hist Elim-S02' and Yr < [year])

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, CC, TP, BusCat, Contract, UWyr,TTY,Flex1,Flex2,Flex4, Amt1) (select '[batchID]', Ledger, Co, GL, PC, isnull(CC,''), TP, BusCat, Contract, UWyr,TTY, 'pass1', Flex2,Flex4, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = 'ADJ Elim-S02' and Yr < =[year])

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, CC, TP, BusCat, Contract, UWyr,TTY,Flex2,Flex4, Amt1) (select '[batchID]', Ledger, Co, GL, PC, isnull(CC,''), TP, BusCat, Contract, UWyr,TTY, Flex2,Flex4, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = 'ADJ Elim-S02' and Yr <= [year])
update TransX set Uwyr = '2015' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL and Contract = 'FAC' and Uwyr = '1900' and GL = '5329900'
update TransX set Uwyr = '2017' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL and Contract = 'FAC' and Uwyr = '1900'
update TransX set Amt1 = round(0-Amt1,2), Flex1 = 'pass2' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL

update TransX set GL = m.Descr, GLdesc = c.Descr, Contract = t.Flex4, TP = Co, Co = '2008', Flex1 = 'pass3', BusCat = '21' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on GL = ID inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where Table_ID = 'ElimGLmap3' and KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.Flex1 = 'pass2' and Co <> '2008'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, PC, GL, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat, Amt1, Flex2) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, PC, GL, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat, round(Amt1*.7,2) as Amt1, '3 Calc' as Flex2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = '1 Non-QS' and not ((Region = 'USO_CROP' and Hierarchy <> 'USO_MPCI') or Hierarchy in ('USO_AH_EX','USOTRG_MAR','USONWGNLIA')))
update TransX set Flex1 = m.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.GL >= m.Field1 and t.GL <= m.Field2 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'R03' and m.ID = 'GL' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '4 Comm xDAC' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = '5 BB Prem Tax' and Flex2 in ('4 Variance','3 Calc')
update TransX set BusCat = '24' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'pass3' and Contract like 'OACN%'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, PC, GL, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat, Amt1, Flex1, Flex2) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, PC, GL, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat, round(Amt1*.125,2) as Amt1, '4 Comm xDAC' as Flex1, '3 Calc' as Flex2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = '2 QS' and GL like '40%')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, PC, GL, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat, Amt1, Flex2) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, PC, GL, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat, Amt1, '3 Calc' as Flex2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = '1 Non-QS' and ((Region = 'USO_CROP' and Hierarchy <> 'USO_MPCI') or Hierarchy in ('USO_AH_EX','USOTRG_MAR','USONWGNLIA')))
update TransX set Amt1 = round(Amt1 - Amt2,2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and '[version]' = 'QTD'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US' and Amt1 = Amt2 and Amt1 = Amt3
update TransX set Ledger = 'Z004' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF' and Amt1 = Amt3
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG' and Amt1 = Amt2
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('4397000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, PC, GL, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat, Amt1, Flex1, Flex2) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, PC, GL, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, Flex1, '4 Variance' as Flex2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 in ('2 QS','3 Calc') group by KeyID, Ledger, Co, PC, GL, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat,Flex1)
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PCdesc = p.Descr, Region = p.Region from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt2 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('1319900','2319900') and Co = '2999' and PC = '1000000000' and TTY = '806' and Yr = '2020'
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Hierarchy, Region = p.Region from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = '1 Non-QS' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = '2 QS' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = '2008'
